result.shareText: My crypto MBTI on cbti.one is {{type}} ({{title}}) — take the test yourself: https://cbti.one/
result.promotionText: Post your CBTI screenshot on X and @cbti_1 to earn $CBTI airdrops!

questions.q1: If you're stranded on a deserted island and can only keep one on-chain wallet, which do you choose?
questions.q1a: A. A Metamask address packed with blue-chip NFTs and protocol tokens
questions.q1b: B. A Phantom address where you always snag the latest Memes first
questions.q1c: C. A hardware wallet address that hasn't moved in years — the ultimate 'cold' storage
questions.q1d: D. An address holding BNB and actively using BSC for various DApps
questions.q2: What do you think is the core appeal of blockchain?
questions.q2a: A. Infinite composability and orthodox decentralized ecosystems
questions.q2b: B. Blazing performance, rock-bottom fees, and high-frequency interaction
questions.q2c: C. Absolute value storage and macroeconomic inflation resistance
questions.q2d: D. Low-cost high-efficiency ecosystem apps with BNB as the core asset
questions.q3: A coin you just bought drops 30% in 2 hours. Your reaction?
questions.q3a: A. Normal volatility — maybe even place a buy order on CEX to average down
questions.q3b: B. Not zero yet, so I'll hold or cut losses and jump into the next 2x opportunity
questions.q4a: A. Years — diamond hands through bull and bear markets
questions.q4b: B. Hours or days — sell on 2x, sometimes flipping in under 30 minutes
questions.q5: Before buying a new project, the first thing you check is?
questions.q5a: A. Website, whitepaper, tokenomics, funding rounds, and GitHub commit history
questions.q5b: B. Twitter buzz, KOL shilling, and whether there's a fun Meme narrative
questions.q6: When the market crashes, you tend to trust?
questions.q6a: A. On-chain data (e.g., whale flows, exchange net inflows) and technical indicators
questions.q6b: B. Community sentiment, fear index, and whether the 'family' is still holding
questions.q7: Where are most of your assets currently held?
questions.q7a: A. Self-custody wallets (e.g., Metamask, Ledger, Phantom)
questions.q7b: B. Top-tier CEXs (e.g., Binance, OKX, Bybit)
questions.q8: How do you feel about 'private keys / seed phrases'?
questions.q8a: A. My lifeline. I love the security of full control, even if operations are cumbersome
questions.q8b: B. Too much hassle — I'd rather not risk losing it. I trust big exchanges' security and slick UIs

taglines.E-H-F-N: Blue chips in hand, a friend for all seasons.
taglines.E-D-F-C: Charts are war; leverage is truth.
taglines.S-H-R-N: High-performance believer — Solana for the long haul.
taglines.S-H-R-C: DCA Solana and let time do the talking.
taglines.S-H-F-N: Meme to the moon, diamond hands.
taglines.S-H-F-C: SOL will overtake ETH. Mark my words.
taglines.S-D-F-N: Sleep is for the weak, Sol is for the moon.
taglines.B-H-R-N: Private keys are sovereignty. Cold storage forever.
taglines.B-D-F-N: Inscriptions on repeat. Community is the signal.
taglines.B-D-F-C: The halving is coming. Hold the line.
taglines.N-H-F-N: Binance ecosystem — an oldie but a goodie.
taglines.N-H-F-C: BNB rock solid — ecosystem growing steadily.
taglines.N-D-R-N: Smart money tracking — on-chain is truth.
taglines.N-D-F-N: BSC meme hunter — nose for alpha.

advice.S-D: Take a break — that F5 key won't last forever.
advice.E-D: Watch out for protocol risks; smart contract bugs can wipe you out.
advice.B-D: Inscriptions are risky — be ready to go to zero.
advice.N-D: Meme coins are fun — but watch out for the traps.
advice.S-H: Hold Solana for the long run. Time will tell.
advice.E-H: DeFi is a goldmine — but patience is the pickaxe.
advice.B-H: HODL to the end. Time is your best friend.
advice.N-H: Steady holding — BNB ecosystem is growing steadily.

E-H-R-N.fullDesc: Ecosystem Guardian. Long-term staking on-chain, deeply researching yields of every Launchpool — the most stable asset ballast for the EVM ecosystem.

E-H-R-C.fullDesc: Ecosystem Builder. Believes in the power of "Build." All logic centers on ETH empowerment, focusing on real user growth and compliant institutional channels.

E-H-F-N.fullDesc: BNB Customer Service Queen. Maintains the soul of the community and "Binance culture," with an exceptional instinct for ecosystem memes and projects — the bond of community consensus.

E-H-F-C.fullDesc: Extremely loyal. Believes Ethereum is the center of Web3, holding ETH long-term on CEX — the most stable and highest-benefit asset allocation.

E-D-R-N.fullDesc: Efficiency maximalist. Writes scripts to find arbitrage opportunities on EVM chains, frequently trading with optimized gas — data analysis is their core weapon.

E-D-R-C.fullDesc: All-Around Analyst. Skilled at capturing breakout opportunities for ETH ecosystem tokens on exchanges, highly attentive to order book flow — quick entries and exits with minimal drawdown.

E-D-F-N.fullDesc: Meme Chaser Leader. Chasing wherever the crowd goes on L2 — if the group chat is full of "Moon," they go all-in.

E-D-F-C.fullDesc: Emotional Gambler. Specifically chases ETH ecosystem tokens on exchanges — pure intuition, takes profits and runs, never lingers — a major contributor to exchange liquidity.

S-H-R-N.fullDesc: Hardware Extremist. Believes Solana's high throughput can carry all of humanity's transactions. Doesn't care about exchanges — only cares about Rust code and parallel computing efficiency.

S-H-R-C.fullDesc: Macro Speculator. Views SOL as "this generation's ETH," bullish long-term on the tech cycle, but prefers managing assets through compliant CEX environments.

S-H-F-N.fullDesc: Solana Guardian. Helius founder, extreme on-chain native, defends Solana community culture on X daily — believes consensus stems from smooth user experience.

S-H-F-C.fullDesc: VC Long-Haul Investor. Entered early at low prices, assets managed institutionally, believes "SOL will eventually challenge ETH" — undeterred by short-term volatility.

S-D-R-N.fullDesc: Algorithm Predator. Extracts MEV value using on-chain low latency — views Solana as a giant high-frequency ATM, trusts only code and speed.

S-D-R-C.fullDesc: Technical Indicator Fanatic. Skilled at intraday trading of SOL-family tokens on CEX using Elliott Wave Theory — extremely rational, charts only, no narratives.

S-D-F-N.fullDesc: Solana Warrior. Calls meme coins on Twitter daily, charges the wildest shitcoins on-chain. No whitepaper needed — just a viral meme and dreams of 10,000x.

S-D-F-C.fullDesc: Ghost of Liquidity. Chases wherever Solana altcoins gain traction — quick entry to harvest sentiment on CEX, lightning fast, never overstays.

B-H-R-N.fullDesc: Cypherpunk Veteran. Hashcash inventor, advocates for hardware cold wallet storage, focuses solely on macroeconomic models, dismisses all non-PoW chains as heresy.

B-H-R-C.fullDesc: BTC Evangelist. Views BTC as "digital energy." Tech-savvy but prefers massive accumulation through MicroStrategy or ETF-style traditional finance channels.

B-H-F-N.fullDesc: Protocol Pioneer. Ordinals founder, believes in BTC's cultural diversity. Holds BTC but is more fascinated by leaving eternal cultural imprints on-chain.

B-H-F-C.fullDesc: National-Level Stacker. El Salvador President, practices "Buy the Dip," assets held in national treasury (CEX-style management), tweets after buying — never watches the chart.

B-D-R-N.fullDesc: BTC Layer 2 Explorer. Searching for tech arbitrage and ecosystem breakout points on BTC L2 — trying to play the most complex DeFi on the oldest chain.

B-D-R-C.fullDesc: Derivatives King. BitMEX founder, uses BTC volatility for complex macro hedging and options arbitrage — no emotional attachment to Bitcoin, only interested in volatility.

B-D-F-N.fullDesc: On-Chain Launch Aficionado. Wherever there are new protocols (Runes/BRC-20), they join the on-chain token launches wherever community hype is strongest — believes "brute force creates miracles," accepts being trapped.

B-D-F-C.fullDesc: Legendary Trader. Specifically opens massive high-leverage positions before halving cycles or major events — betting on that one needle that changes destiny.

N-H-R-N.fullDesc: Ecosystem Guardian. Long-term staking BNB on-chain, deeply researching yields of every Launchpool — the most stable asset ballast for the BNB ecosystem.

N-H-R-C.fullDesc: Ecosystem Builder. Believes in the power of "Build." All logic centers on BNB empowerment, focusing on real user growth and commercial loops.

N-H-F-N.fullDesc: BNB Customer Service Queen. Maintains the soul of the BNB community and "Binance culture," with an exceptional instinct for ecosystem memes and projects — the bond of community consensus.

N-H-F-C.fullDesc: Extremely loyal. Believes Binance is the center of Web3, holding BNB long-term on CEX — the most stable and highest-benefit asset allocation.

N-D-R-N.fullDesc: Efficiency maximalist. Writes scripts to find arbitrage opportunities on BSC, frequently trading with low gas fees — data analysis is their core weapon.

N-D-R-C.fullDesc: All-Around Analyst. Skilled at capturing breakout opportunities for BNB ecosystem tokens on exchanges, highly attentive to order book flow — quick entries and exits with minimal drawdown.

N-D-F-N.fullDesc: BSC Meme Chaser Leader. Searching for 100x shitcoins on BSC, chasing wherever the crowd goes — if the group chat is full of "Moon," they go all-in.

N-D-F-C.fullDesc: Emotional Gambler. Specifically chases BNB ecosystem meme coins on exchanges — pure intuition, takes profits and runs, never lingers — a major contributor to exchange liquidity.

E-H-R-N.title: Ethereum Guard
E-H-R-N.description: Hardcore chain native. Only on-chain. Deep research. Long-term blue-chip holder.

E-H-R-C.title: Compliance Officer
E-H-R-C.description: Believes in Ethereum fundamentals but keeps assets on CEX for safety. Values research reports.

E-H-F-N.title: NFT Collector
E-H-F-N.description: Early blue-chip NFT diamond hands. Holds tokens on community consensus and aesthetics.

E-H-F-C.title: L2 Believer
E-H-F-C.description: Believes in Ethereum ecosystem's future but buys on exchange and leaves it — the 'retired' user.

E-D-R-N.title: Yield Harvester
E-D-R-N.description: Professional yield farmer. Arbitrage across complex protocols. Reads code for vulnerabilities.

E-D-R-C.title: IDO Hunter
E-D-R-C.description: Specializes in finding quality EVM projects on CEX for short-term swings. Values institutional backing.

E-D-F-N.title: Chain Navigator
E-D-F-N.description: Always chasing new Alpha on-chain. Follows community sentiment into hot L2s fast.

E-D-F-C.title: OG Speculator
E-D-F-C.description: High-leverage Ethereum small-cap trades on CEX. Pure chart and sentiment reader.

S-H-R-N.title: Ecosystem Builder
S-H-R-N.description: Long-term Solana bull. Deeply involved in node staking. Studies parallel computing.

S-H-R-C.title: High-Performance Believer
S-H-R-C.description: Believes in SOL's tech but DCA on CEX. Not comfortable managing private keys.

S-H-F-N.title: Community Soul
S-H-F-N.description: Long-term holder of core Solana Meme coins. Active on-chain community ambassador.

S-H-F-C.title: SOL Whale
S-H-F-C.description: SOL will surpass ETH. Just accumulates on CEX — a disciplined steady player.

S-D-R-N.title: Scientist / Jitex
S-D-R-N.description: Writes scripts to snipe new launches on-chain. High-frequency trading through data analysis.

S-D-R-C.title: Swing Trader
S-D-R-C.description: Day trades Solana ecosystem tokens on CEX. Obsessed with order book data.

S-D-F-N.title: Pump.fun Gambler
S-D-F-N.description: Chases the wildest Memes on-chain. Pure sentiment. In and out fast. Phantom wallet heavy user.

S-D-F-C.title: Flash Speculator
S-D-F-C.description: Chases wherever the heat is on CEX. SOL tokens only. Pure intuition, no logic.

B-H-R-N.title: Satoshi's Heir
B-H-R-N.description: Purest Bitcoin fundamentalist. Hardware wallet cold storage. Only reads macro models.

B-H-R-C.title: Institutional Follower
B-H-R-C.description: Holds BTC via CEX or ETF long-term. Reads in-depth industry research reports regularly.

B-H-F-N.title: Ordinals Guardian
B-H-F-N.description: Long-term holder of Ordinals or early inscriptions. Believes in Bitcoin ecosystem cultural consensus.

B-H-F-C.title: BTC Pensioner
B-H-F-C.description: Doesn't understand tech or watch charts. Just knows BTC is good. Buys and forgets on CEX.

B-D-R-N.title: Ecosystem Gold Digger
B-D-R-N.description: Finds tech arbitrage opportunities in Bitcoin L2s or protocols like Runes.

B-D-R-C.title: Leverage Arbitrageur
B-D-R-C.description: High-leverage BTC hedging or arbitrage on CEX. Extremely rational.

B-D-F-N.title: Inscription Speculator
B-D-F-N.description: Mints every new protocol inscription on-chain. Pure community shilling intensity.

B-D-F-C.title: Halving Gambler
B-D-F-C.description: Bets on BTC volatility. Uses options and futures around key events for big wins.

N-H-R-N.title: DeFi Deep Diver
N-H-R-N.description: Long-term BNB holder. Participates in staking and liquidity provision on BSC. Deep researcher.

N-H-R-C.title: BNB Value Investor
N-H-R-C.description: Long-term BNB or related token holder on CEX. Values BNB ecosystem profitability and fundamentals.

N-H-F-N.title: Community OG
N-H-F-N.description: Active in BNB Chain ecosystem. Has unique judgment on Memes and community projects.

N-H-F-C.title: BNB Accumulator
N-H-F-C.description: Believes in BNB's long-term value. Long-term holder on CEX, infrequent trader.

N-D-R-N.title: Scientist / Arbitrager
N-D-R-N.description: Writes scripts to snipe launches or find arbitrage on BSC. Data-driven on-chain operator.

N-D-R-C.title: Swing Trader
N-D-R-C.description: Day trades BNB ecosystem tokens on CEX. Obsessed with order book and fund flow data.

N-D-F-N.title: Meme Digger
N-D-F-N.description: Chases the wildest Memes on BSC chain. Pure community sentiment. In and out fast.

N-D-F-C.title: Flash Speculator
N-D-F-C.description: Chases hot Memes within BNB ecosystem on CEX. Pure intuition and community sentiment.
